recommendations.title: Bruce Lee, My Brother
recommendations.overview: An action-dramatic biopic of the eponymous martial arts legend as told by his younger brother, Robert Lee. It revolves around Bruce Lee's life as a rebellious adolescent in Hong Kong before he sets off for the USA and conquers the world at the age of
recommendations.director: Manfred Wong Man-Chun, Raymond Yip Wai-Man

recommendations.title: A Brighter Summer Day
recommendations.overview: A boy experiences first love, friendships and injustices growing up in 1960s Taiwan.

recommendations.title: The Blackwell Ghost
recommendations.overview: A filmmaker tries to prove that ghosts are real but soon regrets his intentions after he finds himself being terrorized in a haunted house by a ghost with a dark past. An authentic documentary that shows actual ghost footage that was captured on came

recommendations.title: Man of Tai Chi
recommendations.overview: In Beijing, a young martial artist's skill places him in position to experience opportunities and sacrifices.

recommendations.title: Population 436
recommendations.overview: A census-taker is sent to investigate why a certain small town has had the same population -- 436 residents -- for the last 100 years.

recommendations.title: Bhoothnath
recommendations.overview: Moving into a new house, a family witnesses an unfriendly ghost who wants to drive them away from the house. However, he befriends a little boy who changes his outlook forever.

recommendations.title: Demonic
recommendations.overview: A police officer and a psychologist investigate the deaths of five people who were killed while trying to summon ghosts.

recommendations.title: Thir13en Ghosts

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Fist of Fury
recommendations.overview: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, Chen Zhen, the star pupil of a recently-deceased martial arts teacher battles a Japanese dojo which seeks the demise of his fighting school.
